/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/FileSwitch.dir/FileSwitch_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileSwitch.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileSwitch.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileSwitch.dir/src/network/discovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileSwitch.dir/src/network/transfer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileSwitch.dir/src/widgets/devicewidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileSwitch.dir/src/widgets/filequeuewidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileSwitch.dir/src/widgets/progresswidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileSwitch.dir/src/widgets/acceptdialog.cpp.o -o FileSwitch.app/Contents/MacOS/FileSwitch -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
